scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/types build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/utils build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/middleware build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/database build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/identity-service build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/consent-service build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/licensing-service build && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/representation-service build
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/types type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/utils type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/middleware type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/database type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/identity-service type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/consent-service type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/licensing-service type-check && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/representation-service type-check
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/identity-service test && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/consent-service test && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/licensing-service test && pnpm --filter @trulyimagined/representation-service test
